title: Better Saturated Grass
description: Makes grass more saturated and visually appealing. Compatible with other resource packs!
body:
**Better Saturated Grass Pack**  

This resource pack enhances the appearance of terrain blocks by making them more vibrant and visually appealing. The following blocks now have a richer, more saturated look:  

- Grass block  
- Snow-covered grass block  
- Dirt path  
- Podzol  
- Mycelium  
- Warped nylium  
- Crimson nylium  

### **Special Feature:**  
Dirt paths "spread" their texture to the block below, ensuring a seamless look in villages.  

### **Purpose:**  
This pack improves the color and vibrancy of terrain blocks while maintaining full compatibility with other resource packs. No external textures or mods are required—only vanilla block models are adjusted.  

---  

### **FAQ**  

**Q: Does this work with my resource pack?**  
**A:** Yes, it’s fully compatible.  

**Q: Do I need any mods to use this?**  
**A:** No mods required.  

**Q: How does this compare to similar packs?**  
**A:** This resource pack:  
✔ Enhances block colors for a more vibrant and lively look.  
✔ Uses only block models (no custom textures), ensuring compatibility with other resource packs.  
✔ Requires no mods.  
✔ Supports other packs that modify block models.  
✔ Includes down-spreading dirt paths for smoother village terrain.  

**Q: Will you make versions for older Minecraft updates?**  
**A:** No backports are planned.
